name: Land
description: Purchases of lands without buildings

name: Capital Work In Progress
description: Construction of buildings and costs associated to buildings

name: Installations
description: Purchases of installations related to buildings, like solar panels or heater

name: Furniture and Fixture
description: Large expenses related to workplaces

name: Plant and Machinery
description: Other type of property, like plants, machinery or various equipment

name: Tools and Equipment
description: Machinery and tools directly related to your business

name: IT Equipment
description: Technological products or services bought for your business

name: Vehicle
description: Purchase of a car, including second hand or after-lease contract

name: Vehicle Accessories
description: All accessories purchases related to your professional vehicle

name: Accumulated Amortization - Software and ERP Systems
Current Portion of Long Term Liabilities
Liabilities Against Assets Subject to Finance Lease
Issued, subscribed and paid up capital
Revaluation Surplus on Property and Equipment
Cost of Goods Sold
description: Expenses representing the direct cost of goods sold during the period.

name: Carriage Inwards
description: Costs for transporting goods purchased to the company's premises.

name: Purchases
description: Expenses for purchasing goods or materials for resale or production.

name: Other Staff Benefits
description: Company's personel costs excluding compensations, contributions and vouchers

name: Salary and Wages
description: Expenses for salaries, wages, and related employee compensation.

name: Rent Rates and Taxes
description: Rental fees related to your workplace

name: Traveling and Conveyance
description: Expenses incurred during business trips (Excluding Flights, Hotels, Daily expenses, public transportation)

name: Vehicle Running Expenses
description: Expenses made for the repair and maintenance of a vehicle

name: Telephone and Internet
description: Internet or phone bills incurred

name: Electricity Fitting
description: Costs for installing or maintaining electrical fittings and systems.

name: Printing and Stationery
description: Expenses for office stationery, printed materials, and supplies.

name: Fee and Subscription
description: Subscriptions to clubs and associations related to your business

name: Legal and Professional Charges
description: Bills from lawyers, fees paid to the justice system

name: Office Consumables and Supplies
description: Various supplies bought for your workplace or office, like pencils, paper etc

name: Entertainment Expenses
description: Expenses for business-related entertainment and hospitality.

name: Repair and maintenance
description: Services related to the maintenance of your worplace, like repair or cleaning fees

name: Postage Expenses
description: Costs for mailing, courier, and postal services.

name: Canteen Expenses
description: Expenses for providing meals or refreshments to employees.

name: Bad Debts Written Off
description: Losses from customer receivables determined to be uncollectible.

name: Charity and Donations
description: Expenses for charitable contributions and donations made by the company.

name: Insurance
description: Expenses for insurance premiums covering business operations or assets.

name: Misc Expenses
description: Expenses for minor or infrequent costs not classified elsewhere.

name: Auditor's Remuneration
description: Bills from your accountant or accounting firm

name: Electricity Expenses
description: Bills from your water and energy suppliers

name: Raw Materials
description: All goods purchased as raw materials used by your activity

name: Consumables
description: Consumables bought and used in the context of your activity

name: Studies & Works
description: Compensation and fees paid to other parties

name: General Subcontracting
description: Compensation and fees with other partners that act as subcontractors or consultants for your activity

name: Goods for Resale
description: Goods you buy to resale later, as part of your activity

name: Vehicle Rent
description: Rental of cars, including shared services, but excluding leasing

name: Office Services
description: All expenses made for your office or workplace that are not material goods

name: Fuel
description: All fuel expenses for a car

name: Software
description: Licenses or computer services (like repairs or upgrades)

name: Administration Fees
description: Services incurred for the administration of your business (excluding supplies)

name: Fire Insurance
description: Fees related to insurance to protect your property (building and content) against fire or other natural catastrophies

name: Professional Insurance
description: All fees related to insurance taken in the context of your business

name: Legal Protection Insurance
description: Insurance against legal costs incurred in the context of your activity

name: Professional Liability Insurance
description: Insurance for damage caused to third parties

name: Flights
description: All expenses related to travel by plane

name: Hotels
description: Hotel or B&B bills incurred during business trips

name: Public Transportation
description: Travel expenses done using public transportation (metro, bus, tramways, ...)

name: Business Gift
description: Business gifts to clients over 16,000+ PKR

name: Employee Compensation
description: Compensation costs for employees and manual workers employed by the company

name: Bar & Restaurant
description: Expenses incurred when eating or drinking at bars or restaurants

name: Food: Reception & Delivery
description: Food or drinks incurred outside of bars or restaurants, like receptions, canteen and food delivery, etc

name: Training & Documentation
description: Training fees not including food and drinks

name: Social Security
description: All fees related to pension plans and social security contributions

name: Property Tax
description: Local taxes that have to paid due to the ownership of property

name: Import Fees
description: Customs fees incurred while importing goods from outside of the European Union

name: Advertisement and Marketing
description: Publicity fees for your activity, including promotional material

name: Sample Expense
description: Expenses for products or samples distributed for marketing or promotion.

name: Commission on Sales
description: Expenses for sales commissions paid to agents or representatives.

name: Freight Outward
description: Costs for delivering goods sold to customers.

name: Bank Charges and Commission
description: Nasty charges and interests from your bank

name: Foreign Exchange Difference Loss
description: Gains or losses from currency exchange rate fluctuations.

name: Income Tax Expense
description: Taxes levied on the company's taxable income.

name: Depreciation of Installations
description: Expenses for depreciating installation-related assets over their useful life.

name: Depreciation of Furniture & Fixture
description: Expenses for depreciating office furniture and equipment over their useful life.

name: Depreciation of Plant and Machinery
description: Expenses for depreciating machinery and tools over their useful life.

name: Depreciation - IT Equipment
description: Expenses for depreciating computer hardware and software over their useful life.

name: Depreciation of Motor Vehicles
description: Expenses for depreciating motor vehicles over their useful life.

name: Depreciation of Vehicle Accessories
description: Expenses for depreciating vehicle accessories over their useful life.

name: Cash Discount Loss
description: Reductions in revenue from discounts granted for early payments.

name: Cash Difference Loss
description: Losses from cash count differences and unexplained variances.
